claims.text: As a Lead Software Engineer with 19+ years building and shipping production web systems at enterprise scale, I'm excited to bring my full-stack PHP/Laravel background to SoftPeak's Lead Backend PHP Engineer (Laravel) role.
claims.reframing_note: Reframes the summary's general 19+ years / full-stack emphasis toward the PHP/Laravel lead-engineer angle the offer specifically asks for; no fact added beyond the source summary.

claims.text: In my current lead role at EPAM Systems I direct a 20-person engineering team within a 47-member delivery organization, owning architecture decisions, release quality, and cross-team coordination — the same lead-level ownership this position calls for.

I've built and maintained Laravel-based REST API services for enterprise clients — applying OOP/MVC principles, PSR coding standards, and Eloquent ORM, and integrating 10+ third-party APIs (payment gateways, CRMs, data feeds) — directly matching the Laravel backend and RESTful API focus of this role.
claims.reframing_note: Emphasizes the Laravel/PSR/Eloquent/API-integration facts already present in the source achievement as directly relevant to the offer's PHP/Laravel and RESTful-API must-haves; no numbers or facts added beyond the source.

claims.text: I've also implemented and maintained REST and SOAP integrations connecting CMS platforms to third-party services — payment gateways, CRMs, and data feeds — across up to 5 concurrent client projects, which lines up with your need for experience integrating external APIs and services.
claims.reframing_note: Draws an explicit connection from the source's REST/SOAP/payment-gateway/CRM integration experience to the offer's 'external APIs and services (payments...)' must-have; no new facts introduced.

claims.text: On the DevOps side, I established CI/CD pipelines with Travis CI and GitHub Actions and standardized containerized local development with Docker Compose, reducing environment drift across the delivery team — practical experience with the CI/CD toolchain you're looking for.
claims.reframing_note: Frames existing CI/CD/Docker Compose experience as a match to the offer's 'AWS, Azure, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines' must-have; no fabricated tooling added.

claims.text: I bring hands-on experience with AWS as part of my cloud platform toolkit.
I bring hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure as well, covering both major clouds referenced in your requirements.
Docker is a core part of my day-to-day toolchain, reinforcing the containerization experience your team needs.
On the data layer, I work regularly with MySQL as part of my production database toolkit.
I also work regularly with PostgreSQL, directly relevant to your relational-database requirement.

Earlier in my career as Technical Director, I led proactive security incident response across 10+ compromised client sites — vulnerability identification, remediation, and full production restoration with zero recurrence — reflecting the security-conscious engineering mindset this role's authentication and access-control work requires.
claims.reframing_note: Reframes hands-on security-incident-response experience as evidence of a security-conscious mindset relevant to the offer's secure-authentication/RBAC requirement. The source claim describes incident response and remediation, not OAuth2/JWT implementation specifically — the connection is emphasis/reframe, not a literal OAuth2/JWT skill claim, so it should not be treated as a fabricated auth-protocol claim.

claims.text: My English proficiency is Upper-Intermediate (B2), matching the language level you specify.

Beyond the core backend work, I currently lead AI-assisted engineering adoption across my delivery team — standardizing tools like Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, and Cursor for code generation, review, and test scaffolding while holding the line on code-quality gates — a modern engineering practice I'd bring to SoftPeak's backend team as well.
claims.reframing_note: Presented as an added-value differentiator for the lead role; the underlying fact (leading AI-tool adoption across the delivery team) is unchanged from the source.
